orientation.title: What this page covers
orientation.description: BioChroma Labs supports release, investigation, and shelf-life work across chemistry, microbiology, and stability.
points: Analytical testing for identity, potency, and chemistry-related quality questions
Microbiology testing for safety, contamination risk, and hygiene support
Stability support for shelf-life and storage decisions

serviceLines.title: Analytical Testing
serviceLines.subtitle: Identity, potency, and chemistry support
serviceLines.description: Use analytical testing to verify product composition, support release, and investigate chemistry-related questions.

serviceLines.title: Microbiology Testing
serviceLines.subtitle: Safety and contamination control
serviceLines.description: Use microbiology testing to support product safety, batch release, and contamination-related investigations.

serviceLines.title: Stability Support
serviceLines.subtitle: Shelf-life and storage decisions
serviceLines.description: Use stability support to plan pull schedules, monitor trends, and support defensible expiry and storage decisions.
services: Protocol planning and pull schedule design
ICH climatic zone and photostability studies
Trend reporting for quality and regulatory review

serviceAssurance.title: Clear scope and turnaround
serviceAssurance.description: Each project starts with an agreed scope, timing, and reporting plan.

serviceAssurance.title: Reporting built for review
serviceAssurance.description: Deliverables are structured for customer review, release decisions, and documentation needs.

serviceAssurance.title: Direct technical contact
serviceAssurance.description: A designated contact coordinates updates and next steps.

customerFit.title: Who this page is for
segments: Founders and brand teams preparing products for market
Manufacturers and operations teams managing release timelines
QA/QC and regulatory teams preparing for review or audit

relatedPathway.title: Need formulation or launch-readiness support?
relatedPathway.description: Use Product Development for formulation help, troubleshooting, and planning work before routine testing.
relatedPathway.label: Explore Product Development
